pageContext.name: Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn
pageContext.description: Psychologically speaking, vengeance rarely brings the catharsis we hope for.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn Fine Art Print, a cinematic DC Comics art print by artist Tula Lotay.  She's the one they should be scared of! With a new lease on life emancipated from Mistah J, Harley Quinn is ready to hit the town — with a mallet, a baseball bat, or an insightful and cutting behavioral analysis. Inspired by actress Margot Robbie's now-iconic take on the Clown Princess of Crime, this vivid portrait pops with more colors than a confetti gun and is covered in lipstick kisses. Harley poses with her hammer slung over her shoulders as she and her girl gang take on Gotham City's criminal underbelly. Anyone for a post-victory breakfast sandwich?  Originally created as the cover for Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn, written by Amanda Conner and Jimmy Palmiotti for DC Comics, this energetic Birds of Prey artwork is now available for fans in a fine art format. Each Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this Harley Quinn wall art is a total knockout!  Gather up Gotham's most fantabulous girl gang in your collection when you pair Harley Quinn with the Birds of Prey: Black Canary and Birds of Prey: Huntress art prints by Tula Lotay, sold separately.  You know what they say: Behind every successful collection is a badass broad. Bring home the Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn Fine Art Print by Tula Lotay for your wall today.
